lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically reliable and has been regularly serviced. The exterior and interior show minor signs of normal wear but no major damage.

This car is a fantastic find! It has been well-maintained and is in good, solid condition. While it shows a bit of character from regular use, it runs great and is ready for many more miles. You'll love how dependable and clean this ride is!
This vehicle is in fair condition. The engine and transmission are functional but show age. The exterior has some scratches and minor dents. The interior shows moderate wear and staining.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require substantial mechanical work to be reliable. The engine is currently experiencing significant oil leaks and the transmission struggles to shift smoothly between gears. Cosmetically, the body shows heavy wear, including several deep scratches, a dent on the passenger side door, and noticeable rust around the wheel wells. The interior upholstery is torn in several places and the air conditioning is non-functional. This car is being sold as-is, ideally for parts or as a major project for someone with mechanical expertise.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint retains a strong shine, though there are minor cosmetic blemishes such as a few small stone chips on the front fascia and a light scratch on the passenger door consistent with its age. The interior is clean and well-kept, with only minor wear on the driver's seat bolster and all interior features, including the infotainment and climate control, operating correctly. Mechanically, the car is solid, having received regular oil changes and recent tire rotations, and it drives smoothly without any known issues. It represents a reliable and well-presented option for anyone looking for a quality pre-owned vehicle that has been genuinely cared for.

We are proud to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. From its flawless exterior finish to its immaculate interior appointments, every detail confirms its status as a premier investment-grade automobile. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection, this vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You have to check out this absolute gem! It's in such incredible, mint condition that you'd honestly think it was brand new. I've babied this car from day one, and it's looking flawless inside and out. It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next big adventure! I'm so excited for whoever gets to take this beauty home—come see it for yourself!
Presenting an investment-grade 2011 Porsche 911 Carrera S (997.2) in showroom condition. This example
Mint condition. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Garage kept.

This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a showroom-quality specimen in absolute mint condition. The exterior paint is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like luster protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating and maintained in a climate-controlled environment. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear, the interior still retains its original scent, and every technological feature operates with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring exceptionally low mileage and a complete, documented service history that ensures peak performance. From the pristine, curb-rash-free alloy wheels to the immaculate engine bay, every detail has been meticulously preserved for the discerning collector who demands perfection.

This meticulously curated vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, offered in truly impeccable condition. Every aspect of this specimen, from its flawless exterior luster to its pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care rarely seen in the pre-owned market. We invite the discerning enthusiast to experience an automotive investment that yields both prestige and performance without compromise.

We are proud to present this meticulously preserved vehicle, maintained to an exacting standard that rivals its original showroom state. Every aspect of this motorcar—from its pristine coachwork to its flawlessly curated interior—reflects a legacy of uncompromising care. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands excellence, this offering provides an unrivaled opportunity to acquire a specimen of superior caliber and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem! Honestly, it's in such incredible shape, you'd think it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've taken such good care of it—it's been my pride and joy, but it’s finally time for it to find a new home. It runs like a dream and looks flawless inside and out. You really have to see it in person to believe how pristine it is! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to chat more about it!
Presenting an investment-grade E92 M3, powered by the legendary S65 4.0L V8 with
Pristine condition. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Garage kept. Inspection welcome.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its original luster and mechanical integrity. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish protected by a high-end ceramic coating, free of any chips or imperfections. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and untouched, complemented by pristine trim and original floor mats. Every service milestone has been documented and performed by certified technicians, ensuring the engine and transmission operate with surgical precision. With low mileage and zero cosmetic or mechanical flaws, this car presents an incredible opportunity for the collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than the best.

We are pleased to present this vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and preserved in showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects meticulous care, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments. This is an exemplary specimen for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than peak automotive excellence.

We are privileged to present this superlative specimen, maintained in impeccable, showroom-grade condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in pristine, original state. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical perfection, this unit offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than absolute excellence.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—not a single scratch or dent to be found! It’s been pampered since day one, always garage-kept, and it drives just as smooth as the day I bought it. If you’re looking for a ride that looks and feels brand new, this is definitely the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade specimen featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain is perfectly synchronized, with a proactive dual-VANOS overhaul ensuring peak volumetric efficiency. Power is managed via a precise Getrag
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Full service history. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that redefines the standard for pristine automotive care. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, ensuring the factory paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster without a single blemish, swirl mark, or stone chip. The interior is a masterclass in preservation; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of any creasing, while the high-grade trim and dashboard appear untouched by time. Every electronic feature, from the immersive sound system to the advanced driver-assist technologies, operates with flawless precision. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting an exhaustive, no-expense-spared service history and an engine bay so clean it looks brand new. With exceptionally low mileage and a set of fresh, high-performance tires, this car delivers a tight, responsive, and quiet ride that is indistinguishable from its original delivery day. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a showroom-quality masterpiece that satisfies even the most rigorous inspection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that rivals its original showroom state. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to uncompromising quality. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly superlative condition, offering an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector.

Presenting an exceptional example of automotive preservation, this vehicle is offered in impeccable, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained to the most exacting standards, it features flawless aesthetics and mechanical integrity that will satisfy the most discerning collector. This is a premier opportunity to acquire a vehicle that remains indistinguishable from its original delivery state, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I’m so excited to find a new home for this absolute beauty! 🚗 It is in truly spectacular, like-new condition—I’ve babied it from day one, so it’s still looking and driving like it just left the showroom. If you're looking for something flawless and ready to hit the road, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
This collector-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of the S54-powered era, featuring a high-revving 3.2L inline
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Maintenance records available. No accidents. Clean title.

Presenting an absolute gem: a meticulously maintained vehicle in showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero chips, scratches, or swirl marks, while the premium leather interior remains soft and supple, smelling as fresh as the day it left the factory. Under the hood, the engine is spotless and performs with precision, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history from authorized specialists. Every feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist technologies, functions flawlessly. This car has been garage-kept, never seen a winter, and driven only on fair-weather weekends. If you are looking for an uncompromising example of automotive excellence that feels and drives like new, this is the one.

We are pleased to present this peerless acquisition, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a level of preservation rarely encountered on the secondary market. This vehicle represents the definitive pinnacle of its class, curated specifically for the most discerning automotive enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.
